# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Linked Issue

<!--
Required if this PR addresses a tracked issue. Use a GitHub closing keyword so the
linked issue is closed automatically on merge. Multiple keywords are allowed.

Examples:
  closes #123
  fixes #456 fixes #457
  resolves s977043/plangate#789
-->

closes #

## Validation

- [ ] I ran the relevant checks locally.
- [ ] I updated documentation when behavior changed.
- [ ] I considered security, privacy, and backward compatibility impacts.
- [ ] **If this PR addresses a tracked issue, I included a closing keyword (`closes #N` / `fixes #N` / `resolves #N`) above so the issue auto-closes on merge.**

## Notes for reviewers

Add any review focus areas, rollout notes, or follow-up work here.
